title: The Mud at Unbound Was so Bad That People Peed on Their Drivetrains to Clean Them
content:
Drastic times call for drastic measures, as riders at the 2026 Unbound Gravel 200-mile and XL were forced to use every tool in their toolbox to keep moving through the harsh mud of the Flint Hills.

Read the full article at The Mud at Unbound Was so Bad That People Peed on Their Drivetrains to Clean Them on Velo.
author: Logan Jones-Wilkins
